# vendor/abc2svg-1.js

Local copy of the abc2svg core script.

- **Source**: http://moinejf.free.fr/js/abc2svg-1.js
- **Repository**: https://chiselapp.com/user/moinejf/repository/abc2svg
- **License**: LGPL-3.0+
- **Downloaded**: 2026-04-22
- **Copyright**: Jean-François Moine

## Why vendored

The `abc2svg` npm package is deprecated. The author distributes the canonical
version directly from his server. This file is the concatenated, minified build
of the abc2svg core (abc2svg-1.js).

## Updating

Replace `abc2svg-1.js` with the latest version from the source URL above.
Commit with a message noting the download date and any relevant changes.

## Usage

This file is only imported by `../src/AbcParser.ts`. No other file in the
project may import it directly.
